summary: The define phase (iteration 3) for 'Human in the Loop Pause' produced only documentation artifacts under .pipeliner/ (requirements.md, open_questions.md, discovery_notes.md, and step metadata) — no source code, migrations, config, or other runnable/testable changes. `git diff main...HEAD` shows the branch touches exclusively .pipeliner/** files (no changes under app/, config/, db/, lib/, or worker/src), so there is nothing to build, test, or lint. The target repository is also the live control plane orchestrating this run with a shared development database, so per the step's safety rule the Rails test suite/db tasks must not be invoked here regardless. No test command was run.
